questions.question_text: The newly launched e-commerce platform aims to connect small-scale farmers from rural India with urban consumers, thereby reducing the reliance on middlemen and ensuring _______.
options: a significant reduction in food prices
a direct benefit to the farmers only
a more efficient supply chain management
questions.correct_answer: a more efficient supply chain management
